articles.title: ‘SNL’ recap: Best moments from Jack Black hosting ‘Saturday Night Live’
articles.description:
Jack Black hosted the April 4 episode of "Saturday Night Live," with Jack White as musical guest.

The post ‘SNL’ recap: Best moments from Jack Black hosting ‘Saturday Night Live’ appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Jack Black hosted 'Saturday Night Live' on April 4, showcasing his comedic talents.
Musical guest Jack White performed, attracting attention from Boston music fans.
Local viewers enjoyed a night of entertainment, highlighting Boston's connection to popular culture.
